OmniScript.description: Captures the applicant’s competency and examination details.
OmniScript.name: GPS Competency Examination Details

childElements.name: ExaminationAccountId
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "expression" : "%personAccountId%", "controlWidth" : 12.0, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "label" : "Account ID", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12.0, "hideGroupSep" : false, "hide" : true, "disOnTplt" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "" }

childElements.name: ExaminationDate
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "minDate" : "", "helpText" : "", "controlWidth" : 6, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "modelDateFormat" : "yyyy-MM-dd", "repeatClone" : false, "readOnly" : false, "label" : "Examination Date", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "help" : false, "hide" : false, "dateType" : "string", "repeat" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "maxDate" : "", "HTMLTemplateId" : "" }

childElements.name: ExaminationEffectiveFrom
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "minDate" : "", "helpText" : "", "controlWidth" : 6, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "modelDateFormat" : "yyyy-MM-dd", "repeatClone" : false, "readOnly" : false, "label" : "Effective From Date", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "help" : false, "hide" : false, "dateType" : "string", "repeat" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "maxDate" : "", "HTMLTemplateId" : "" }

childElements.name: ExaminationExternalId
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "expression" : "CONCATENATE(%AccountName%,\"-\",%ExaminationDetails:PersonExamination|n:ExaminationId%)", "controlWidth" : 12, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "dataType" : "Text", "label" : "ExternalId", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "hideGroupSep" : false, "hide" : true, "disOnTplt" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "" }
